questions.question: On November 1, 1998, Zaria Holdings owed N 13,600 in respect of creditor. On November 15, it purchased goods worth N69,000 and paid a cheques of N51,600. To write off bad debt, debit
options: Debtor’s account and credit provision for bad debt.
Bad debt account and credit debtor’s account.
Debtor’ account and credit bad debt.
